mission.title: prometheus: Docker Swarm service discovery
mission.description:
This is a docker swarm implementation without business logic.

Fixes #1766 

Signed-off-by: Julien Pivotto <roidelapluie@inuits.eu>

resolution.summary:
> Are there up to date godocs for the library somewhere? The usual ones are years out of date.

No, I run godoc -http=:8080 locally ... :cry:
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
prometheus:
    image: prom/prometheus
    networks:
      - monitor
    ports:
      - "9090:9090"
    command:
      - '--config.file=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml'
      - '--storage.tsdb.path=/prometheus'
      - '--storage.tsdb.retention=${PROMETHEUS_RETENTION:-24h}'
    volumes:
      - prometheus:/prometheus
      - /home/efs/devops/dsm:/etc/prometheus:ro
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro
    deploy:
      mode: replicated
      replicas: 1
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 1024M
        reservations:
          memory: 128M

scrape_configs:
  - job_name: 'docker'
    dockerswarm_sd_configs:
    - host: unix:///var/run/docker.sock
      role: nodes
